get.description: Returns all API keys for the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a new API key. The full key is returned once and cannot be retrieved again.
Sends a password reset email if the address is registered.
Authenticates a user and returns JWT access + refresh tokens.
Revokes the current access token and optionally the refresh token.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile information.

put.description: Updates the authenticated user's display name and other profile fields.

post.description: Exchanges a refresh token for a new access + refresh token pair.
Resets a user's password using the token received by email.
Creates a new user account. A verification email is sent after signup.
Shorten a URL without an account (rate-limited per IP). Returns a short URL valid for 1 hour.

get.description: Returns all folders for the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a new folder for organising links.

put.description: Updates the name or icon of a folder.

delete.description: Deletes a folder (links inside are not deleted).

get.description: Returns a paginated list of links for the authenticated user.

parameters.description: Search by slug, title or URL
parameters.name: search

post.description: Accepts a multipart CSV file with a 'destination_url' column (max 500 rows).

get.description: Returns a single link by ID.

put.description: Updates fields of an existing link.

get.description: Returns aggregated analytics for a link including click count, time-series data, top referrers, device breakdown, and country breakdown.

parameters.description: Time bucket: hour, day, week, month (default day)
parameters.name: granularity

patch.description: Enables or disables geo-routing for a link.

get.description: Returns all geo-routing rules for a link.

post.description: Adds a country-based redirect rule to a link.

put.description: Updates the country code, destination URL, or priority of a rule.

delete.description: Removes a geo-routing rule from a link.

post.description: Probes the destination URL and updates its health status.

get.description: Returns a QR code image in PNG (default, inline) or SVG (download) format. Supports custom colours, size, and error correction level.
get.summary: Get QR code for a link

parameters.description: Error correction level: L, M, Q, H (default M)
parameters.name: ec

patch.description: Enables or disables A/B split testing for a link.
Toggles the starred flag on the given link.

get.description: Returns all A/B test variants for a link.

post.description: Adds a weighted destination URL variant for A/B testing.

put.description: Updates a variant's destination URL or weight.

get.description: Returns all webhooks for the authenticated user.

post.description: Registers a new webhook endpoint. The signing secret is generated server-side.

put.description: Updates the URL, subscribed events, or active status of a webhook.

get.description: Returns the health status of the API server and its dependencies.
Resolves a slug and redirects to the destination URL. Tracks the click asynchronously.

expires_at.description: RFC3339 string, nullable; null clears expiry

folder_id.description: UUID string; null = remove from folder
